properties.body:
NNAVAREA XIX 46/16
ANDOYA TEST CENTER WILL CONDUCT MISSILE FIRINGS IN THE AREA NORTH OF, AND INSIDE ANDFJORDEN, IN THE TIME PERIOD FROM MAY 31ST TO JUNE 6TH 2016. THE MISSILE FIRINGS WILL BE CONDUCTED BETWEEN 22:00 AND 05:00 LOCAL TIME IN THE ANNOUNCED TIME PERIOD. SEAGOING TRAFFIC IS REQUESTED TO BE AWARE OF, AND STAY OUTSIDE THE FOLLOWING DANGER AREA DURING THE ANNOUNCED PERIODS:

DANGER AREA:
THE FOLLOWING COORDINATES SHOWS THE DANGER AREA
A. N69-11.5 E016-45.4
B. N69-17.3 E016-01.6
C. N69-28.4 E016-13.1
D. N69-21.5 E015-30.1
E. N69-30.8 E014-17.3
F. N70-09.0 E011-54.1
G. N70-58.0 E016-32.7
H. N69-47.0 E016-41.3
I. N69-37.2 E017-28.4
J. N69-11.5 E016-45.4
SEE WWW.TESTCENTER.NO FOR UPDATES IN THE PERIODS
